What We Covered In This Module:
✓ Difference Between The Front-End 	And Backend!
✓ Purpose Of The Front-End 	And Backend!
✓ How The 	A-Players View Each!
✓ The 3 Objectives Of Your Front-End Offer!
✓ Front-End Product Objectives!
✓ How To Set-Up The Sale Of Your First Backend Offer
Module 2

-- 1 of 2 --

What To Do Now:
1. 	Brainstorm ideas for your Front-End Product (taking into
account Marketplace Sophistication) based on your Hook and
Promise.!
2. 	Begin thinking about the first Backend Offer you will make to
customers who purchase your Front-End Product.!
3. 	Begin jotting down ideas for how and when you will use the
“pre-selling” techniques in your front-end product to set-up the
sale for your first backend product.
Module 2

-- 2 of 2 --
